content: Sorry if it's an idiotic question, but do I have any option to replay little dialogues in main menu? I found a log, but these are already complete ones with no options to choose from

Honestly never thought of it. It might exist but I myself don't know

Welp, I'd love to have an option to replay those little ones anew, probably will drop feedback suggestion. It might seems too minor, but assembly of little things is what gives the game immense soul imo.
You can't replay it with different responses but you can view past dialogues.
